# Vendor Intelligence Memory
> Last updated: 2026-05-08 | Source: AccentOS Vendor Ranking module

## Vendor Landscape
- 478 total vendors in VD_RAW (476 active, 2 inactive: ELK HOME id=137, SAYLITE TX id=399)
- 130 vendors assigned to parent company groups (Visual Comfort Group, HVLG, Maska, Acuity, Minka Group, etc.)
- 14 scoring categories per vendor
- 306 vendors still showing "Unverified" badge — outreach campaign will close these

## Scoring System
| Category | Weight | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Discount | High | ≥50% off MSRP = 10 |
| Freight | High | Free freight always = 10 |
| Returns Policy | Medium | Accepts returns, no restock = 10 |
| Lead Time | Medium | Same/next day ship = 10 |
| IMAP Enforcement | High | Actively enforces = 10 |
| Marketing Funds | Medium | ≥3% of purchases = 10 |
| Display Allowance | Medium | Dedicated $$, paid on schedule = 10 |
| Spiff | Medium | >15% spiff all products = 10 |
| Web Listing | Medium | Featured/premier dealer = 10 |
| DTC/Consumer Direct | High | No DTC, dealer exclusive = 10 |
| Consumer Demand | High | High organic search + brand recognition = 10 |
| Rebates | Medium | ≥5% annual = 10 |
| Co-op | Medium | ≥2% accrual, easy claims = 10 |
| Rep Score | Admin only | Never visible on Rep View tab |

**Scoring rules:**
- Missing/unverified = 0 (penalizes gaps)
- Confirmed absent = 0
- Case-by-case = N/A
- Average target = 5 (bell curve)
- Inactive vendors excluded from tier cutoff calculations

## Tier Eligibility
- **Tier A:** Full score + active 24mo + ≥$5K lifetime sales
- **Tier B:** Light score
- **Tier C:** Archived/inactive

## Product Categories (3-tier taxonomy)
Indoor Lighting, Exterior, Fans, More Categories, Commercial, Controls & Accessories  
Each maps to BigCommerce categories and GMC product types.
